CREATE TABLE hash_test (input String, sha1 FixedString(20), sha256 FixedString(32));
INSERT INTO hash_test VALUES ('abc', hex(SHA1('abc')), hex(SHA256('abc')));
INSERT INTO hash_test VALUES ('', hex(SHA1('')), hex(SHA256('')));
INSERT INTO hash_test VALUES ('a' * 1000, hex(SHA1('a' * 1000)), hex(SHA256('a' * 1000)));
INSERT INTO hash_test VALUES ('This is a test string.', hex(SHA1('This is a test string.')), hex(SHA256('This is a test string.')));
SELECT h.input, h.sha1, h.sha256 FROM hash_test h JOIN additional_data a ON h.input = a.extra_data WHERE a.extra_data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT hex(SHA512('test')) AS sha512_hash FROM hash_test WHERE input = 'abc';
SELECT count(*) FROM hash_test WHERE sha1 = hex(SHA1(input));
SELECT sha256, count(*) FROM hash_test GROUP BY sha256;
SELECT input, hex(SHA224(input)) AS sha224_hash FROM hash_test WHERE input != '';
INSERT INTO temp_hash SELECT input FROM hash_test;
SELECT temp_input, hex(SHA512_256(temp_input)) AS sha512_256_hash FROM temp_hash;
SELECT a.temp_input, hex(SHA1(a.temp_input)) AS sha1_hash, h.sha1 FROM temp_hash a LEFT JOIN hash_test h ON a.temp_input = h.input;
SELECT min(sha1) AS min_sha1, max(sha1) AS max_sha1 FROM hash_test WHERE sha1 IS NOT NULL;
